heading: Foreign educational, charitable, and certain other exempt organizations
label: 878 Foreign educational, charitable, and certain other exempt organizations
text: For special provisions relating to foreign educational, charitable, and other exempt organizations, see sections 512(a) and 4948.
notes: Amendments1969— substituted provisions requiring reference to organizations in sections 512(a) and 4948 for provisions requiring reference to trusts in section 512(a), and struck out reference to unrelated business income.Pub. L. 91–172

Effective Date of 1969 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to taxable years beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 91–172section 101(k)(2)(B) of Pub. L. 91–172section 4940 of this titleDec. 31, 1969
